finding: A framework `node atm.mjs git commit --auto-stage` again returned `ATM_GIT_COMMIT_OK` while committing only `.atm/history/evidence/git-head.jsonl`; 15 tracked release mirror files remained modified. This reproduces the failure class that backlog row 039 records as fixed.
expectedBehavior: Framework auto-stage success must prove that the intended dirty files were staged and included, or fail before creating an evidence-only commit; release mirrors generated by the canonical build need an explicit recognized staging class.
evidenceOrRepro: Commit `057ac25cb755c6e43f5800d26420fac494f9be61` contains one git-head line only, while `git status --short` immediately afterward still listed all generated release mirrors.
followUp: Fixed by teaching `isFrameworkGeneratedArtifactAllowed` to honor claim globs via `pathMatchesTaskScope` (so `release/**` admits dirty release mirrors even when absent from release-manifest `generatedFiles`); regression added in `scripts/validate-governance-commands.ts`.
